hook.name: LimitOrderHook
hook.description:
A deployment of OpenZeppelin's LimitOrderHook — a Uniswap v4 hook implementing single-tick limit orders. Users place orders by providing concentrated liquidity at a specific tick; when the pool price crosses that tick, the position is automatically filled and can be withdrawn at any time.

Original implementation by OpenZeppelin (github.com/OpenZeppelin/uniswap-hooks). Deployed to Ethereum mainnet to make this functionality publicly accessible.
